About me

The
Creative
Behind
the Work

Hi, I'm Bayasgalan — a Media Designer based in Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia. I work across the full spectrum of visual design: from brand identities and graphic design to video editing and motion.

I believe great design isn't just about how things look — it's about how they feel, communicate, and connect with people. Every project I take on gets my full creative energy.

What I do

Skills &
Services

🎨
Graphic Design
Visual communication through layout, typography, and imagery. From posters to digital assets — I make things look intentional.
Photoshop Illustrator InDesign
🔤
Logo & Branding
Building brand identities from scratch. Logo design, color systems, typography, and brand guidelines that stand out.
Illustrator Figma Brand Strategy
🎬
Video Editing
Cutting, color grading, and compositing video content. From social media reels to full-length edits — I make footage compelling.
Premiere Pro After Effects DaVinci Resolve
✨
Visual Design
UI mockups, social media visuals, presentations, and anything visual. If it needs to look great, I can make it happen.
Figma Canva Photoshop
